programme.title: BKFC 22: Lombard vs. Hunt
programme.desc: Hector Lombard tries to defend the cruiserweight title against Lorenzo Hunt, while Dat Nguyen looks to take the lightweight title from Luis Palomino. From Nov. 19, 2021.

programme.title: BKFC 45: Palomino vs. Lilley
programme.desc: Luis Palomino vs. James Lilley, lightweight championship bout. From Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: Hitman Fight League
programme.desc: From Indigo at the O2 in London.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: The semifinal matchups for the Bellator light heavyweight world grand prix tournament. From Oct. 16, 2021.

programme.title: Extreme Fighting Championship 131: Michael vs. Bandu
programme.desc: From GrandWest Grand Arena in Cape Town, South Africa.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From CHS Field in Saint Paul, Minn.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Alex Box Stadium in Baton Rouge, La.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Sutter Health Park in Sacramento, Calif.

programme.title: BKFC 42 Greenville: Soto vs. Goodjohn
programme.desc: Antonio Soto III vs. Tyler Goodjohn, lightweights; Doug Coltrane vs. Blake LaCaze, middleweights. From Bon Secours Wellness Arena in Greenville, S.C.

programme.title: BKFC 24
programme.desc: A championship bout between Lorenzo Hunt and Joe Riggs highlights the card.

programme.title: BKFC 47
programme.desc: From July 14, 2023. Features David Mundell vs. Mike Richman for BKFC middleweight title, plus Josh Dyer vs. Jared Warren for interim BKF light heavyweight title from Lakeland, Fla.

programme.title: Warriors Cup
programme.desc: Warriors Cup is the sole US partner of ONE Championship, featuring top Muay Thai athletes from across America and around the world!

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Ireland's No. 4 ranked lightweight Peter Queally faces No. 1 ranked Patricky "Pitbull" Friere in a rematch for the vacant 155-pound title in Dublin. Plus, James Gallagher vs. Patchy Mix in a high-stakes 135-pound scrap.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: 145-pound champion Cris Cyborg makes her third straight title defense against No. 5 ranked contender and Irish boxing sensation Sinead Kavanagh. From Nov. 12, 2021.

programme.title: Hitman Fight League
programme.desc: From Indigo at the O2 in London.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: BYB Extreme Fighting Series 28: Bourbon Street Brawl
programme.desc: From John A. Alario Event Center in New Orleans.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: From Bristol Ice Arena in Bristol, England.

programme.title: International Brawling Championship 1
programme.desc: From Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia on Aug. 28, 2025.

programme.title: BKFC 25: Adams vs. Cleckler
programme.desc: Arnold Adams and Dillon Cleckler square up in a full night of bare knuckle boxing action from Orlando, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 26
programme.desc: Featuring Elvin Brito vs. Luis Palomino for BKFC welterweight title and Francesco Ricchi vs. Uly Diaz for interim BKFC middleweight title from Hollywood, Florida.

programme.title: BKFC 48
programme.desc: From Aug. 11, 2023. Features John Dodson vs. JR Ridge for inaugural BKFC flyweight title, plus Keith Richardson vs. Derek Perez in bare-knuckle boxing action from Albuquerque, New Mexico.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: From Red Owl Boxing Arena in Houston.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Bantamweight champion Sergio Pettis defends his belt from Rizin champ Kyoji Horiguchi. From Dec. 3, 2021 at Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Conn.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Heavyweight champ Ryan Bader returns to the division following his run in the Light Heavyweight World Grand Prix to take on interim heavyweight kingpin Valentin Moldavsky in a unification bout; Darrion Caldwell faces Enrique Barzola.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Joe Tehan, Brian Okin, Straton Wilhelm, Andy Loomis, Julian Parmann, Justin Young and Markus Gonsalves are playing $100/$100 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.desc: The top Bellator fighters represent the organization against Japanese MMA organization Rizin Fighting Federation. Watch the top stars from both promotions including A.J. McKee, Roberto de Souza, Patricio Pitbull, Kyoji Horiguchi and Juan Archuleta..

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton rescuers Chris and Dee Hattaway's roles collide when treating a skier with a suspected spinal injury.

programme.desc: Kai Lenny travels to the Portuguese village of Nazaré to train with big wave charger Lucas 'Chumbo' Chianca.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck

programme.desc: Dr. Paul Piff begins research at Lake Tahoe to discover what connects us in an era of loneliness and division.

programme.desc: The UCI team at the Tahoe Lab measures how awe impacts happiness, gratitude, relationships, and well-being.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County Search and Rescue races to find two overdue snowmobilers in the remote backcountry.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A snowboarder is caught in a high-risk avalanche zone. SAR braves the sliding terrain for a risky extraction.

programme.title: Get a Little Out There with Alex Honnold
programme.desc: Pro climber Alex Honnold explores the Las Vegas backyard he calls home.

programme.title: Get a Little Out There with Alex Honnold
programme.desc: Alex Honnold scales a vertical bus, a sand dune, and joins Tommy Caldwell for an ascent on a granite wall.

programme.title: Crankworx 2026
programme.desc: Crankworx Rotorua offers a dynamic mix of elite competitions with events ranging from Downhill to Slopestyle.

programme.title: Memorial Hermann IRONMAN Texas North American Championship April 2026
programme.desc: Welcome to The Big Show, where dreams are tested, and the spirit of the Lone Star State is unbreakable.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.sub-title: Searching for Awe in Lake Tahoe
programme.desc: Dr. Paul Piff begins research at Lake Tahoe to discover what connects us in an era of loneliness and division.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.sub-title: What If Feeling Small Is Good For You?
programme.desc: Follow the Tahoe Lab research team as they share unprecedented results on how 2 minutes of awe affects us all.

programme.title: Descending
programme.desc: History fanatic Scott talks Ellis into diving the shark-infested waters off the coast of the Solomon Islands.

programme.title: PaddyO Sucks at
programme.desc: Can veterans like Mirna Valerio and Brendan Leonard help PaddyO check “ultrarunning” off his bucket list?

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Seasoned travel writer Jonathan Thompson travels to Cody, Wyoming, a gateway to the American West.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson travels to San José, Costa Rica, the lively city at the crossroads of culture and adventure.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.sub-title: Kayaking the Waitukubuli Sea Trail – Part 1
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the Caribbean’s first and only sea kayaking trail, the Waitukubuli Sea Trail in Dominica.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.sub-title: Kayaking the Waitukubuli Sea Trail – Part 2
programme.desc: Ken Whiting continues his exploration of the Caribbean’s the Waitukubuli Sea Trail in Dominica.
